questions.text: Which of these is a renewable source of energy?
questions.explanation: Wind energy is renewable as it is continuously available. Coal, petroleum, and natural gas are non-renewable fossil fuels.

questions.text: Soil erosion can be prevented by planting trees.
questions.explanation: Planting trees (afforestation) helps prevent soil erosion as tree roots hold the soil firmly.

questions.text: What is the main cause of water scarcity?
questions.correctAnswer: Overuse, pollution, and unequal distribution of water resources.
questions.explanation: Water scarcity is caused by overuse for agriculture and industry, pollution of water bodies, and unequal distribution of water resources.

questions.text: The process of collecting and storing rainwater is called ________ harvesting.
questions.explanation: Rainwater harvesting is the collection and storage of rainwater for later use, helping conserve water resources.
